name: oss-anki
description: Open-source, framework-free implementation of Anki: a precise FSRS-6 / SM-2 spaced-repetition core with full .apkg/.colpkg interop.
author: Phylliida Dev
comment: Core (index/fsrs/model/text/ids/sha1) is dependency-free by import graph; only the ./apkg interop module imports sql.js, fflate, and fzstd.
